caption: The video shows a screen recording of a web browser navigating the website RANDOM.ORG. The site features a white background with the logo "RANDOM.ORG" and the subtitle "True Random Number Service" at the top. A red banner at the bottom displays the text "WWW.JAYPSYCASERBREAKS.COM" and the logo "CASEBREAKS.COM." A chat window on the right side shows messages from users "ingaped" and "Nightbot," including the text "i think if you are a team signing Ohantu, you are going all in on everyone you can" and "Click for the link for the BREAK SCHEDULE SHIPPING INFO and MORE! >>> https://rb.gy/N2SceBkg9." The user first accesses the "Dice Roller" tool, then switches to the "List Randomizer" where they enter a numbered list from 1 to 10. Finally, the user returns to the "Dice Roller" and rolls two dice, resulting in a "2" and a "2" with a timestamp of "2023-11-23 03:23:32 UTC."
